examples: Violent crime is only one of the maladies afflicting modern society.
After the thing had closed with a peculiarly afflicting sermon the applause was enthusiastic.
OF ALL the blights afflicting the sea, carbon dioxide is just one.
But there's another resource-draining plague afflicting these countries, one hiding in plain sight: smoking.
Not the kind of feeling that engenders affection for the person afflicting it. (you).
